title: System Settings Overview
drDigitalIntro: System Settings is where you customize how your Mac works. Open Apple menu > System Settings. You'll find options for everything: how your trackpad works, when your screen turns off, privacy settings, sound, display, keyboard behavior. Think of System Settings like your home — you adjust it so it's comfortable and works the way you like.
drDigitalSuccess: You know where to find Mac settings!
drDigitalHint: System Settings is where you personalize your Mac.
